prompt:
Hyper-realistic outdoor fashion portrait. A stylish young adult East Asian woman standing next to a glossy black luxury sedan, shot from a three-quarter rear perspective. Centered from the top of the head to just below the hips and upper thighs. The upper body occupies the center of the frame, with the car extending horizontally behind. Body turned away from the lens, head gently turned to the right showing a refined profile. Gaze directed downward toward the car door—a quiet, dignified, natural candid atmosphere.

Character: Slender and elegant build, warm fair skin, soft shoulder lines, natural body proportions. Relaxed and elegant posture—arms behind the back, hands loosely held near the lumbar region, mostly obscured. Shoulders flat, back natural, low-profile stance.

Profile (face visible top right): Delicate features, straight bridge of the nose, soft brow shape, downcast dark eyes, understated rose-red lip color. Minimalist natural makeup: smooth realistic skin, light blush, lightly drawn eyelashes, soft satin lip color. Natural pores, soft tone transitions; no artificial beauty filters.

Hairstyle: Long straight glossy black hair, slightly side-parted, falling smoothly to the upper back and waist. Most hair rests on the left shoulder blade and center of the back; a small section follows the right side of the neck. Fine single hair strands, delicate flyaways, realistic weight, restrained cool daylight highlights. Naturally maintained state, not overly styled.

Clothing: Fitted short camisole in an understated blush beige or light dusty brown—extremely thin spaghetti straps, a straight neckline nearly invisible from the back, low square back. Ends above the waist, exposing a narrow area of the lower back. Soft, smooth, slightly elastic fabric with subtle horizontal folds and realistic tension on the back. Opaque, no logo. High-waisted light blue jeans fitting the waist, hips, and upper thighs—light stone-wash texture, golden-beige contrast stitching, center back seam, belt loops, two sharp back pockets. Unique decorative details on the upper edges of the back pockets: delicate white lace trim paired with light pink satin bows. Several delicate pink ribbon ends hang vertically by the pockets, asymmetrical and gently curved by gravity. Decorations sewn onto the denim with visible textile texture and realistic stitch points. Realistic fading, slight scuffing, seam tension, slight worn highlights. Upper legs extend down to the edge of the crop.

Car: Glossy black sedan seen from the side—the rear passenger door fills the central and lower background. Dark tinted windows, chrome trim, curved roofline, glossy black paint. The car surface acts as a mirror: reflecting the woman's silhouette, surrounding trees, light sky, and parts of the street. Layered reflections on the door and window—slightly darker and softer than the subject. No brand logo, no identifiable license plate. The window cuts diagonally behind the shoulders and upper torso—a chrome frame acts as a bright narrow line between the dark glass and the roof. The area below the door is nearly black, with delicate blue-gray highlights and realistic panel seams. Reflections follow the curved geometry of the car body rather than being flat.

Background: Tall dark cast-iron fence—vertical bars, decorative diagonal elements, geometric crosses. Dense evergreen shrubs and fine leaves behind the fence—a deep green-black textured background. Far left: part of a light beige stone or concrete building pillar with visible rectangular panel gaps. Thin dark cables or branches extend loosely by the wall, adding environmental realism.

Lighting: Soft natural daylight, bright overcast sky, or open shade. Diffuse light from above and slightly to the left—illuminating the upper back, shoulders, arms, and hair. Glowing but not overexposed skin. Soft highlights on the crown of the hair, shoulder lines, camisole straps, and denim seams. Soft, detailed shadows around the hair, arms, waist, car door, and fence.

Tones: Glossy black, light blue denim, blush beige, soft pink ribbons, warm fair skin, deep green vegetation, understated stone, cool chrome. Realistic saturation—pink pocket accents serve as the main decorative color detail. No orange skin, no overly vivid blues, no artificial HDR.

Camera: Chest to waist height, full-frame 70–85mm, f/2.8–f/4. The woman, clothing details, and the closest car reflections are sharp and clear; the cast-iron fence and vegetation are slightly softened. Natural perspective compression, accurate body proportions. Natural, feminine, refined, soft cinematic street fashion style.

Negative: No text, no watermarks, no brand logos, no extra people, no repetitive reflections, no deformed car geometry, no deformed hands, no extra limbs, no exaggerated poses, no transparent clothing, no strong flash, no plastic-looking skin, no over-saturated colors, no heavy glamour retouching, no cluttered background.

Centered from the top of the head to just below the hips and upper thighs. The upper body occupies the center of the frame, with the car extending horizontally behind. Body turned away from the lens, head gently turned to the right showing a refined profile. Gaze directed downward toward the car door—a quiet, dignified, natural candid atmosphere.

promptZh:
超写实户外时尚人像。一位时尚的年轻女性 东亚女性 站在一辆 亮黑色豪华轿车 旁，采用四分之三背面视角拍摄。画面中心从头顶延伸至臀部及大腿上部。上半身占据画面中心，轿车在身后横向延伸。身体背对镜头，头部轻微向右转，露出精致的侧脸。视线向下看向车门——营造出一种安静、端庄、自然的抓拍氛围。

人物：身材苗条优雅，肤色白皙红润，肩部线条柔和，身体比例自然。姿态放松优雅——双臂置于身后，双手在腰部附近自然交叠，大部分被遮挡。双肩平直，背部自然，姿态低调。

侧脸（面部可见于右上角）：五官精致，鼻梁挺直，眉形柔和，眼眸低垂，唇色为低调的玫瑰红。极简自然妆容：皮肤细腻真实，轻扫腮红，睫毛描画自然，唇部呈现柔和的丝缎质感。可见自然毛孔，色调过渡柔和；无人工美颜滤镜。

发型：黑色长直发，光泽感强，略带偏分，自然垂落在上背部和腰间。大部分头发落在左肩胛骨和背部中心；一小束头发顺着颈部右侧垂下。发丝细腻，有少量碎发，质感真实，带有克制的冷色调日光高光。保持自然状态，未过度造型。

服装：修身短款吊带背心，颜色为低调的 腮红米色或浅灰棕色——极细的肩带，背部几乎不可见的直线领口，大露背设计。长度在腰部以上，露出小面积后腰。面料柔软顺滑，略带弹性，背部呈现细微的横向褶皱和真实的张力感。不透明，无 Logo。高腰浅蓝色牛仔裤，贴合腰部、臀部和大腿上部——浅色石磨洗水纹理，金米色撞色缝线，后中缝，腰带环，两个清晰的后口袋。后口袋上缘有独特的装饰细节：精致的白色蕾丝花边搭配浅粉色缎带蝴蝶结。几条精致的粉色丝带末端垂直悬挂在口袋旁，受重力影响呈现不对称的自然弯曲。装饰物缝在牛仔布上，可见纺织纹理和真实的缝合点。真实的褪色感、轻微磨损、接缝张力及轻微的磨损高光。大腿上部延伸至画面底部边缘。

轿车：侧面可见的亮黑色轿车——后排乘客车门占据了画面中央及下方的背景。深色车窗，镀铬饰条，弧形车顶线条，亮黑色车漆。车身表面如同镜面：反射出女性的剪影、周围的树木、明亮的天空以及部分街道。车门和车窗上的倒影层次分明——比主体略暗且柔和。无品牌 Logo，无可见车牌。车窗在双肩后方呈对角线切割——镀铬边框在深色玻璃和车顶之间形成一条明亮的细线。车门下方区域近乎黑色，带有细腻的蓝灰色高光和真实的面板接缝。倒影遵循车身的弧形几何结构，而非平面的。

背景：高大的黑色铸铁栅栏——竖条栏杆，装饰性对角元素，几何十字花纹。栅栏后方是茂密的常绿灌木和细碎叶片——深绿黑色的纹理背景。最左侧：部分浅米色石材或混凝土建筑立柱，可见矩形面板缝隙。细长的深色电缆或枝条在墙边随意延伸，增加了环境的真实感。

光影：柔和的自然日光，明亮的阴天或开阔的阴影处。来自上方和左前方的漫射光——照亮了后背、肩膀、手臂和头发。皮肤透亮但不曝光过度。发顶、肩线、背心肩带和牛仔裤缝线处有柔和的高光。头发、手臂、腰部、车门和栅栏周围有柔和且细节丰富的阴影。

色调：亮黑色、浅蓝色牛仔、腮红米色、柔粉色丝带、白皙红润的肤色、深绿色植被、低调的石材、冷色调镀铬。饱和度真实——粉色口袋装饰作为主要的装饰色彩点缀。无橘色皮肤，无过度鲜艳的蓝色，无人工 HDR 感。

相机：胸部至腰部高度，全画幅 70–85mm 镜头，f/2.8–f/4 光圈。女性主体、服装细节及最近处的车身倒影清晰锐利；铸铁栅栏和植被略微虚化。自然的透视压缩，准确的身体比例。自然、女性化、精致、柔和的电影感街头时尚风格。

负面提示词：无文字，无水印，无品牌 Logo，无多余人物，无重复倒影，无变形的车身几何结构，无变形的手部，无多余肢体，无夸张姿势，无透明服装，无强闪光灯，无塑料感皮肤，无过度饱和的色彩，无厚重的精修，无杂乱背景。
